news.t: First Trust Launches the First Trust Multi-Manager Small Cap Opportunities ETF

holdings.infoBox: MMSC is an equity ETF with a total of 210 individual holdings. The top holdings are Credo Technology Group Holding stock at 2.24%, Bloom Energy at 2.05%, nLIGHT at 1.33%, Xometry at 1.29%, and FirstCash Holdings at 1.28%.

overview.description: The First Trust Multi-Manager Small Cap Opportunities ETF (MMSC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund is an actively managed ETF that utilizes a multi-manager approach to provide exposure to small-cap US growth stocks. MMSC was launched on Oct 13, 2021 and is issued by First Trust.

data.title: First Trust Launches the First Trust Multi-Manager Small Cap Opportunities ETF
data.text: WHEATON, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--First Trust Advisors L.P. (“First Trust”), a leading exchange-traded fund (“ETF”) provider and asset manager, announced today that it has launched a new actively manage...
